who: accounting firms processing 5–15 quarterly audit logs
offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 quarterly audit logs, inefficient management causes compliance risks. We consolidate and format logs instead of manual consolidation of logs.
problem: Inefficient management of quarterly audit trail logs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo video
Join community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try manual log entry and formatting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as user templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing data
Provide one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
